4115			NULL
4116		},
4117		&autovacuum_anl_scale,
4118		0.1, 0.0, 100.0,
4119		NULL, NULL, NULL
4120	},
4121
4122	{
4123		{"checkpoint_completion_target", PGC_SIGHUP, WAL_CHECKPOINTS,
4124			gettext_noop("Time spent flushing dirty buffers during checkpoint, as fraction of checkpoint interval."),
4125			NULL
4126		},
4127		&CheckPointCompletionTarget,
4128		0.9, 0.0, 1.0,
4129		NULL, assign_checkpoint_completion_target, NULL
4130	},
4131
4132	{
4133		{"log_statement_sample_rate", PGC_SUSET, LOGGING_WHEN,
4134			gettext_noop("Fraction of statements exceeding \"log_min_duration_sample\" to be logged."),
4135			gettext_noop("Use a value between 0.0 (never log) and 1.0 (always log).")
4136		},
4137		&log_statement_sample_rate,
4138		1.0, 0.0, 1.0,
4139		NULL, NULL, NULL
4140	},
4141
4142	{
4143		{"log_transaction_sample_rate", PGC_SUSET, LOGGING_WHEN,
4144			gettext_noop("Sets the fraction of transactions from which to log all statements."),
4145			gettext_noop("Use a value between 0.0 (never log) and 1.0 (log all "
4146						 "statements for all transactions).")
4147		},
4148		&log_xact_sample_rate,
4149		0.0, 0.0, 1.0,
4150		NULL, NULL, NULL
4151	},
4152
4153	{
4154		{"vacuum_max_eager_freeze_failure_rate", PGC_USERSET, VACUUM_FREEZING,
4155			gettext_noop("Fraction of pages in a relation vacuum can scan and fail to freeze before disabling eager scanning."),
4156			gettext_noop("A value of 0.0 disables eager scanning and a value of 1.0 will eagerly scan up to 100 percent of the all-visible pages in the relation. If vacuum successfully freezes these pages, the cap is lower than 100 percent, because the goal is to amortize page freezing across multiple vacuums.")
4157		},
4158		&vacuum_max_eager_freeze_failure_rate,
4159		0.03, 0.0, 1.0,
4160		NULL, NULL, NULL
4161	},
4162
4163	/* End-of-list marker */
4164	{
4165		{NULL, 0, 0, NULL, NULL}, NULL, 0.0, 0.0, 0.0, NULL, NULL, NULL
4166	}
4167};

4170struct config_string ConfigureNamesString[] =
4171{
4172	{
4173		{"archive_command", PGC_SIGHUP, WAL_ARCHIVING,
4174			gettext_noop("Sets the shell command that will be called to archive a WAL file."),
4175			gettext_noop("An empty string means use \"archive_library\".")
4176		},
4177		&XLogArchiveCommand,
4178		"",
4179		NULL, NULL, show_archive_command
4180	},
4181
4182	{
4183		{"archive_library", PGC_SIGHUP, WAL_ARCHIVING,
4184			gettext_noop("Sets the library that will be called to archive a WAL file."),
4185			gettext_noop("An empty string means use \"archive_command\".")
4186		},
4187		&XLogArchiveLibrary,
4188		"",
4189		NULL, NULL, NULL
4190	},
4191
4192	{
4193		{"restore_command", PGC_SIGHUP, WAL_ARCHIVE_RECOVERY,
4194			gettext_noop("Sets the shell command that will be called to retrieve an archived WAL file."),
4195			NULL
4196		},
4197		&recoveryRestoreCommand,
4198		"",
4199		NULL, NULL, NULL
4200	},
4201
4202	{
4203		{"archive_cleanup_command", PGC_SIGHUP, WAL_ARCHIVE_RECOVERY,
4204			gettext_noop("Sets the shell command that will be executed at every restart point."),
4205			NULL
4206		},
4207		&archiveCleanupCommand,
4208		"",
4209		NULL, NULL, NULL
4210	},
4211
4212	{
4213		{"recovery_end_command", PGC_SIGHUP, WAL_ARCHIVE_RECOVERY,
4214			gettext_noop("Sets the shell command that will be executed once at the end of recovery."),
4215			NULL
4216		},
4217		&recoveryEndCommand,
4218		"",
4219		NULL, NULL, NULL
4220	},
4221
4222	{
4223		{"recovery_target_timeline", PGC_POSTMASTER, WAL_RECOVERY_TARGET,
4224			gettext_noop("Specifies the timeline to recover into."),
4225			NULL
4226		},
4227		&recovery_target_timeline_string,
4228		"latest",
4229		check_recovery_target_timeline, assign_recovery_target_timeline, NULL
4230	},
4231
4232	{
4233		{"recovery_target", PGC_POSTMASTER, WAL_RECOVERY_TARGET,
4234			gettext_noop("Set to \"immediate\" to end recovery as soon as a consistent state is reached."),
4235			NULL
4236		},
4237		&recovery_target_string,
4238		"",
4239		check_recovery_target, assign_recovery_target, NULL
4240	},
4241	{
4242		{"recovery_target_xid", PGC_POSTMASTER, WAL_RECOVERY_TARGET,
4243			gettext_noop("Sets the transaction ID up to which recovery will proceed."),
4244			NULL
4245		},
4246		&recovery_target_xid_string,
4247		"",
4248		check_recovery_target_xid, assign_recovery_target_xid, NULL
4249	},
4250	{
4251		{"recovery_target_time", PGC_POSTMASTER, WAL_RECOVERY_TARGET,
4252			gettext_noop("Sets the time stamp up to which recovery will proceed."),
4253			NULL
4254		},
4255		&recovery_target_time_string,
4256		"",
4257		check_recovery_target_time, assign_recovery_target_time, NULL
4258	},
4259	{
4260		{"recovery_target_name", PGC_POSTMASTER, WAL_RECOVERY_TARGET,
4261			gettext_noop("Sets the named restore point up to which recovery will proceed."),
4262			NULL
4263		},
4264		&recovery_target_name_string,
4265		"",
4266		check_recovery_target_name, assign_recovery_target_name, NULL
4267	},
4268	{
4269		{"recovery_target_lsn", PGC_POSTMASTER, WAL_RECOVERY_TARGET,
4270			gettext_noop("Sets the LSN of the write-ahead log location up to which recovery will proceed."),
4271			NULL
4272		},
4273		&recovery_target_lsn_string,
4274		"",
4275		check_recovery_target_lsn, assign_recovery_target_lsn, NULL
4276	},
4277
4278	{
4279		{"primary_conninfo", PGC_SIGHUP, REPLICATION_STANDBY,
4280			gettext_noop("Sets the connection string to be used to connect to the sending server."),
4281			NULL,
4282			GUC_SUPERUSER_ONLY
4283		},
4284		&PrimaryConnInfo,
4285		"",
4286		NULL, NULL, NULL
4287	},
4288
4289	{
4290		{"primary_slot_name", PGC_SIGHUP, REPLICATION_STANDBY,

4292			NULL
4293		},
4294		&PrimarySlotName,
4295		"",
4296		check_primary_slot_name, NULL, NULL
4297	},
4298
4299	{
4300		{"client_encoding", PGC_USERSET, CLIENT_CONN_LOCALE,
4301			gettext_noop("Sets the client's character set encoding."),
4302			NULL,
4303			GUC_IS_NAME | GUC_REPORT
4304		},
4305		&client_encoding_string,
4306		"SQL_ASCII",
4307		check_client_encoding, assign_client_encoding, NULL
4308	},
4309
4310	{
4311		{"log_line_prefix", PGC_SIGHUP, LOGGING_WHAT,
4312			gettext_noop("Controls information prefixed to each log line."),
4313			gettext_noop("An empty string means no prefix.")
4314		},
4315		&Log_line_prefix,
4316		"%m [%p] ",
4317		NULL, NULL, NULL
4318	},
4319
4320	{
4321		{"log_timezone", PGC_SIGHUP, LOGGING_WHAT,
4322			gettext_noop("Sets the time zone to use in log messages."),
4323			NULL
4324		},
4325		&log_timezone_string,
4326		"GMT",
4327		check_log_timezone, assign_log_timezone, show_log_timezone
4328	},
4329
4330	{
4331		{"DateStyle", PGC_USERSET, CLIENT_CONN_LOCALE,
4332			gettext_noop("Sets the display format for date and time values."),
4333			gettext_noop("Also controls interpretation of ambiguous "
4334						 "date inputs."),
4335			GUC_LIST_INPUT | GUC_REPORT
4336		},
4337		&datestyle_string,
4338		"ISO, MDY",
4339		check_datestyle, assign_datestyle, NULL
4340	},
4341
4342	{
4343		{"default_table_access_method", PGC_USERSET, CLIENT_CONN_STATEMENT,

4345			NULL,
4346			GUC_IS_NAME
4347		},
4348		&default_table_access_method,
4349		DEFAULT_TABLE_ACCESS_METHOD,
4350		check_default_table_access_method, NULL, NULL
4351	},
4352
4353	{
4354		{"default_tablespace", PGC_USERSET, CLIENT_CONN_STATEMENT,
4355			gettext_noop("Sets the default tablespace to create tables and indexes in."),
4356			gettext_noop("An empty string means use the database's default tablespace."),
4357			GUC_IS_NAME
4358		},
4359		&default_tablespace,
4360		"",
4361		check_default_tablespace, NULL, NULL
4362	},
4363
4364	{
4365		{"temp_tablespaces", PGC_USERSET, CLIENT_CONN_STATEMENT,
4366			gettext_noop("Sets the tablespace(s) to use for temporary tables and sort files."),
4367			gettext_noop("An empty string means use the database's default tablespace."),
4368			GUC_LIST_INPUT | GUC_LIST_QUOTE
4369		},
4370		&temp_tablespaces,
4371		"",
4372		check_temp_tablespaces, assign_temp_tablespaces, NULL
4373	},
4374
4375	{
4376		{"createrole_self_grant", PGC_USERSET, CLIENT_CONN_STATEMENT,
4377			gettext_noop("Sets whether a CREATEROLE user automatically grants "

4379			gettext_noop("An empty string disables automatic self grants."),
4380			GUC_LIST_INPUT
4381		},
4382		&createrole_self_grant,
4383		"",
4384		check_createrole_self_grant, assign_createrole_self_grant, NULL
4385	},
4386
4387	{
4388		{"dynamic_library_path", PGC_SUSET, CLIENT_CONN_OTHER,
4389			gettext_noop("Sets the path for dynamically loadable modules."),
4390			gettext_noop("If a dynamically loadable module needs to be opened and "
4391						 "the specified name does not have a directory component (i.e., the "
4392						 "name does not contain a slash), the system will search this path for "
4393						 "the specified file."),
4394			GUC_SUPERUSER_ONLY
4395		},
4396		&Dynamic_library_path,
4397		"$libdir",
4398		NULL, NULL, NULL
4399	},
4400
4401	{
4402		{"extension_control_path", PGC_SUSET, CLIENT_CONN_OTHER,
4403			gettext_noop("Sets the path for extension control files."),
4404			gettext_noop("The remaining extension script and secondary control files are then loaded "

4406			GUC_SUPERUSER_ONLY
4407		},
4408		&Extension_control_path,
4409		"$system",
4410		NULL, NULL, NULL
4411	},
4412

4516	},

4518	{
4519		/* Can't be set in postgresql.conf */
4520		{"server_encoding", PGC_INTERNAL, PRESET_OPTIONS,
4521			gettext_noop("Shows the server (database) character set encoding."),
4522			NULL,
4523			GUC_IS_NAME | GUC_REPORT | GUC_NOT_IN_SAMPLE | GUC_DISALLOW_IN_FILE
4524		},
4525		&server_encoding_string,
4526		"SQL_ASCII",
4527		NULL, NULL, NULL
4528	},
4529
4530	{
4531		/* Can't be set in postgresql.conf */
4532		{"server_version", PGC_INTERNAL, PRESET_OPTIONS,

4536		},
4537		&server_version_string,
4538		PG_VERSION,
4539		NULL, NULL, NULL
4540	},
4541
4542	{
4543		/* Not for general use --- used by SET ROLE */
4544		{"role", PGC_USERSET, UNGROUPED,
4545			gettext_noop("Sets the current role."),
4546			NULL,
4547			GUC_IS_NAME | GUC_NO_SHOW_ALL | GUC_NO_RESET_ALL | GUC_NOT_IN_SAMPLE | GUC_DISALLOW_IN_FILE | GUC_NOT_WHILE_SEC_REST
4548		},
4549		&role_string,
4550		"none",
4551		check_role, assign_role, show_role
4552	},
4553
4554	{
4555		/* Not for general use --- used by SET SESSION AUTHORIZATION */

4558			NULL,
4559			GUC_IS_NAME | GUC_REPORT | GUC_NO_SHOW_ALL | GUC_NO_RESET_ALL | GUC_NOT_IN_SAMPLE | GUC_DISALLOW_IN_FILE | GUC_NOT_WHILE_SEC_REST

4562		NULL,

4564	},
4565
4566	{
4567		{"log_destination", PGC_SIGHUP, LOGGING_WHERE,
4568			gettext_noop("Sets the destination for server log output."),
4569			gettext_noop("Valid values are combinations of \"stderr\", "
4570						 "\"syslog\", \"csvlog\", \"jsonlog\", and \"eventlog\", "
4571						 "depending on the platform."),
4572			GUC_LIST_INPUT
4573		},
4574		&Log_destination_string,
4575		"stderr",
4576		check_log_destination, assign_log_destination, NULL
4577	},
4578	{
4579		{"log_directory", PGC_SIGHUP, LOGGING_WHERE,
4580			gettext_noop("Sets the destination directory for log files."),
4581			gettext_noop("Can be specified as relative to the data directory "

4583			GUC_SUPERUSER_ONLY
4584		},
4585		&Log_directory,
4586		"log",
4587		check_canonical_path, NULL, NULL
4588	},
4589	{

4592			NULL,
4593			GUC_SUPERUSER_ONLY
4594		},
4595		&Log_filename,
4596		"postgresql-%Y-%m-%d_%H%M%S.log",
4597		NULL, NULL, NULL
4598	},
4599

4820	{
4821		{"ssl_tls13_ciphers", PGC_SIGHUP, CONN_AUTH_SSL,
4822			gettext_noop("Sets the list of allowed TLSv1.3 cipher suites."),
4823			gettext_noop("An empty string means use the default cipher suites."),
4824			GUC_SUPERUSER_ONLY
4825		},
4826		&SSLCipherSuites,
4827		"",
4828		NULL, NULL, NULL
4829	},
4830
4831	{
4832		{"ssl_ciphers", PGC_SIGHUP, CONN_AUTH_SSL,

4834			NULL,
4835			GUC_SUPERUSER_ONLY
4836		},
4837		&SSLCipherList,
4838#ifdef USE_OPENSSL

4840#else
4841		"none",
4842#endif

4844	},
4845
4846	{

4848			gettext_noop("Sets the group(s) to use for Diffie-Hellman key exchange."),
4849			gettext_noop("Multiple groups can be specified using a colon-separated list."),
4850			GUC_SUPERUSER_ONLY
4851		},
4852		&SSLECDHCurve,
4853#ifdef USE_SSL

4855#else
4856		"none",
4857#endif
4858		NULL, NULL, NULL
4859	},

4862		{"ssl_dh_params_file", PGC_SIGHUP, CONN_AUTH_SSL,

4866		},
4867		&ssl_dh_params_file,
4868		"",
4869		NULL, NULL, NULL
4870	},

4875			gettext_noop("An empty string means use the built-in prompting mechanism."),
4876			GUC_SUPERUSER_ONLY
4877		},
4878		&ssl_passphrase_command,
4879		"",
4880		NULL, NULL, NULL
4881	},
4882
4883	{

4885			gettext_noop("Sets the application name to be reported in statistics and logs."),
4886			NULL,
4887			GUC_IS_NAME | GUC_REPORT | GUC_NOT_IN_SAMPLE
4888		},
4889		&application_name,
4890		"",
4891		check_application_name, assign_application_name, NULL
4892	},
4893
4894	{

4896			gettext_noop("Sets the name of the cluster, which is included in the process title."),
4897			NULL,
4898			GUC_IS_NAME
4899		},
4900		&cluster_name,
4901		"",
4902		check_cluster_name, NULL, NULL
4903	},
4904
4905	{
4906		{"wal_consistency_checking", PGC_SUSET, DEVELOPER_OPTIONS,
4907			gettext_noop("Sets the WAL resource managers for which WAL consistency checks are done."),
4908			gettext_noop("Full-page images will be logged for all data blocks and cross-checked against the results of WAL replay."),
4909			GUC_LIST_INPUT | GUC_NOT_IN_SAMPLE
4910		},
4911		&wal_consistency_checking_string,
4912		"",
4913		check_wal_consistency_checking, assign_wal_consistency_checking, NULL
4914	},
4915
4916	{
4917		{"jit_provider", PGC_POSTMASTER, CLIENT_CONN_PRELOAD,

4920			GUC_SUPERUSER_ONLY
4921		},
4922		&jit_provider,
4923		"llvmjit",
4924		NULL, NULL, NULL
4925	},

4932		},
4933		&backtrace_functions,
4934		"",
4935		check_backtrace_functions, assign_backtrace_functions, NULL

4938	{

4940			gettext_noop("Use direct I/O for file access."),
4941			gettext_noop("An empty string disables direct I/O."),

4945		"",
4946		check_debug_io_direct, assign_debug_io_direct, NULL
4947	},
4948
4949	{
4950		{"synchronized_standby_slots", PGC_SIGHUP, REPLICATION_PRIMARY,
4951			gettext_noop("Lists streaming replication standby server replication slot "
4952						 "names that logical WAL sender processes will wait for."),
4953			gettext_noop("Logical WAL sender processes will send decoded "
4954						 "changes to output plugins only after the specified "
4955						 "replication slots have confirmed receiving WAL."),
4956			GUC_LIST_INPUT
4957		},
4958		&synchronized_standby_slots,
4959		"",
4960		check_synchronized_standby_slots, assign_synchronized_standby_slots, NULL
4961	},

4968		},
4969		&restrict_nonsystem_relation_kind_string,
4970		"",
4971		check_restrict_nonsystem_relation_kind, assign_restrict_nonsystem_relation_kind, NULL

4979		},

4981		"",

4983	},

4988			NULL,
4989			GUC_LIST_INPUT
4990		},

5024	},
5025
5026	{
5027		{"client_min_messages", PGC_USERSET, CLIENT_CONN_STATEMENT,
5028			gettext_noop("Sets the message levels that are sent to the client."),
5029			gettext_noop("Each level includes all the levels that follow it. The later"
5030						 " the level, the fewer messages are sent.")
5031		},
5032		&client_min_messages,
5033		NOTICE, client_message_level_options,
5034		NULL, NULL, NULL
5035	},

5044		NULL, NULL, NULL
5045	},

5053		},

5085		},

5299			NULL
5300		},
5301		&xmlbinary,
5302		XMLBINARY_BASE64, xmlbinary_options,
5303		NULL, NULL, NULL
5304	},

5321		},

5324		NULL, NULL, NULL
5325	},

5342		},

5346	},

5348	{
5349		{"debug_parallel_query", PGC_USERSET, DEVELOPER_OPTIONS,
5350			gettext_noop("Forces the planner's use parallel query nodes."),
5351			gettext_noop("This can be useful for testing the parallel query infrastructure "
5352						 "by forcing the planner to generate plans that contain nodes "
5353						 "that perform tuple communication between workers and the main process."),
5354			GUC_NOT_IN_SAMPLE | GUC_EXPLAIN
5355		},
5356		&debug_parallel_query,
5357		DEBUG_PARALLEL_OFF, debug_parallel_query_options,
5358		NULL, NULL, NULL
5359	},
5360
5361	{
5362		{"password_encryption", PGC_USERSET, CONN_AUTH_AUTH,
5363			gettext_noop("Chooses the algorithm for encrypting passwords."),
5364			NULL
5365		},
5366		&Password_encryption,
5367		PASSWORD_TYPE_SCRAM_SHA_256, password_encryption_options,
5368		NULL, NULL, NULL
5369	},
5370
5371	{
5372		{"plan_cache_mode", PGC_USERSET, QUERY_TUNING_OTHER,
5373			gettext_noop("Controls the planner's selection of custom or generic plan."),
5374			gettext_noop("Prepared statements can have custom and generic plans, and the planner "
5375						 "will attempt to choose which is better.  This can be set to override "
5376						 "the default behavior."),
5377			GUC_EXPLAIN
5378		},
5379		&plan_cache_mode,
5380		PLAN_CACHE_MODE_AUTO, plan_cache_mode_options,
5381		NULL, NULL, NULL
5382	},
5383
5384	{
5385		{"ssl_min_protocol_version", PGC_SIGHUP, CONN_AUTH_SSL,
5386			gettext_noop("Sets the minimum SSL/TLS protocol version to use."),
5387			NULL,
5388			GUC_SUPERUSER_ONLY
5389		},
5390		&ssl_min_protocol_version,
5391		PG_TLS1_2_VERSION,
5392		ssl_protocol_versions_info + 1, /* don't allow PG_TLS_ANY */
5393		NULL, NULL, NULL
5394	},
5395
5396	{
5397		{"ssl_max_protocol_version", PGC_SIGHUP, CONN_AUTH_SSL,
5398			gettext_noop("Sets the maximum SSL/TLS protocol version to use."),
5399			NULL,
5400			GUC_SUPERUSER_ONLY
5401		},
5402		&ssl_max_protocol_version,
5403		PG_TLS_ANY,
5404		ssl_protocol_versions_info,
5405		NULL, NULL, NULL
5406	},
5407
5408	{
5409		{"recovery_init_sync_method", PGC_SIGHUP, ERROR_HANDLING_OPTIONS,
5410			gettext_noop("Sets the method for synchronizing the data directory before crash recovery."),
5411		},
5412		&recovery_init_sync_method,
5413		DATA_DIR_SYNC_METHOD_FSYNC, recovery_init_sync_method_options,
5414		NULL, NULL, NULL
5415	},
5416
5417	{
5418		{"debug_logical_replication_streaming", PGC_USERSET, DEVELOPER_OPTIONS,
5419			gettext_noop("Forces immediate streaming or serialization of changes in large transactions."),
5420			gettext_noop("On the publisher, it allows streaming or serializing each change in logical decoding. "
5421						 "On the subscriber, it allows serialization of all changes to files and notifies the "
5422						 "parallel apply workers to read and apply them at the end of the transaction."),
5423			GUC_NOT_IN_SAMPLE
5424		},
5425		&debug_logical_replication_streaming,
5426		DEBUG_LOGICAL_REP_STREAMING_BUFFERED, debug_logical_replication_streaming_options,
5427		NULL, NULL, NULL
5428	},
5429
5430	{
5431		{"io_method", PGC_POSTMASTER, RESOURCES_IO,
5432			gettext_noop("Selects the method for executing asynchronous I/O."),
5433			NULL
5434		},
5435		&io_method,
5436		DEFAULT_IO_METHOD, io_method_options,
5437		NULL, assign_io_method, NULL
5438	},
5439
5440	/* End-of-list marker */
5441	{
5442		{NULL, 0, 0, NULL, NULL}, NULL, 0, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL
5443	}
5444};
